result.title: Gain-of-function analysis of H5N1 transmissibility in ferrets
result.authorString: Smith J, Jones A, Williams BC
result.abstractText: We describe experiments enhancing airborne transmissibility of H5N1 in ferret models.

result.title: CRISPR-based gene drive for mosquito population suppression
result.abstractText: A self-limiting gene drive construct targeting Anopheles gambiae fertility genes.

result.title: Novel reverse genetics system for Nipah virus
result.authorString: Patel S, Kumar R, Das A
result.abstractText: We report a simplified plasmid-based reverse genetics system for rescue of recombinant Nipah virus.

result.title: Characterisation of a novel bat coronavirus with broad ACE2 tropism
result.abstractText: Metagenomic surveillance identified a novel betacoronavirus in Rhinolophus bats.

result.title: Structural basis of immune evasion by engineered influenza neuraminidase
result.abstractText: Directed evolution of N1 neuraminidase yielded variants escaping all approved neuraminidase inhibitors.
